ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "address" TEXT /* Memory address of the register */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type of the register */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the register */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral the register belongs to */,
  "bit_width" INTEGER /* Number of bits the register occupies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the register */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the register's information */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the register entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_access_type FOREIGN KEY ("access_type") REFERENCES register_accesses ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_accesses" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, read-write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access type entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the access type information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being configured */,
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the use case for which the configuration is applied */,
  "setting" TEXT /* Setting applied to the register */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was applied */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configurations_use_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("use_case_id") REFERENCES use_cases ("use_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configurations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configurations_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_configurations_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register that was changed */,
  "old_setting" TEXT /* Previous setting of the register */,
  "new_setting" TEXT /* New setting of the register */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_changes_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the use case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the use case */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the use case information */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, software developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the role information */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the team */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the team information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Team status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team */,
  "joined_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the team */,
  "left_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being shared */,
  "source_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team sharing the register configuration */,
  "destination_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the register configuration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share event occurred */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* User who shared the register configuration */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the share */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for sharing the register configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_shares_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_shares_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_shares_source_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_shares_destination_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_shares_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripherals" (
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peripheral */,
  "peripheral_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the peripheral */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the peripheral entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the peripheral information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peripheral_id")
)
